notes: Case 01-5 (Moon K. Ham & Charles C. Kim vs. Korean Capital Presbytery) appears only as a docket-list entry on the case roster. The case status was 'in process' at the 29th GA (2001) and no decision opinion was published. The Standing Judicial Commission specifically noted that cases 01-1 through 01-5 and others were complex and related, assigned to a panel of five members, and the SJC had not completed its work on these cases at the time of the 29th GA minutes.
